title: Marketing executive
description:
Position Type: Full-time, Entry-level

What You'll Do

  • Content Creation & Social Media Management: Plan, produce, and schedule engaging multimedia content for social platforms (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook, etc.). Capture and edit photos/videos from robot demos, visitor experiences, and behind-the-scenes moments.
  • Campaign Execution: Assist in developing and launching marketing campaigns.
  • Digital Marketing Support: Help manage email marketing initiatives, basic graphic design (e.g., banners, flyers), and performance tracking across digital channels.
  • Audience Engagement: Monitor and interact with our online community, respond to comments/messages, and help grow our digital following.
  • Event & Promotion Support: Collaborate on live and virtual event promotion, including material preparation, onsite content capture, and post-event follow-up.

What We're Looking For

  • Recent graduate (Diploma/Degree in Marketing, Communications, Media, Business, or related fields).
  • A genuine interest in robotics, technology, and immersive visitor experiences.
  • A creative and communicative individual with an eye for visual storytelling.
  • Basic experience or strong willingness to learn social media management, content creation, and simple design tools.
  • Familiarity with Microsoft Office / Google Workspace.
  • Organized, proactive, and able to manage multiple projects in a fast-paced setting.

Why Join Us?

  • Portfolio-Building Role: Create tangible, shareable content and campaigns from day one.
  • Growth in Tech Marketing: Develop specialized skills in promoting cutting-edge technology within a growing robotics company.
  • Collaborative & Innovative Environment: Join a team that values creativity, experimentation, and cross-functional teamwork.

postedCompany.description:
Stellaris Robotics公司介绍
Empowering Life with Intelligence, Reinventing Industries with Technology.
Stellaris Robotics: Leading a New Era of Robotics Applications in Singapore

Who We Are?
Stellaris Robotics, with "artificial intelligence + robotics" at its core, Focusing on practical applications in industrial robotics, logistics and transportation, commercial settings, and service sectors. It is an emerging intelligent technology enterprise rooted in Singapore and a leading robotics solution provider in the Asia-Pacific region.
We specialize in introducing and distributing world-class robot products for Singapore and regional markets, with business scope covering robot exhibition halls, robot sales, robot leasing, and customized intelligent solutions.
postedCompany.name: STELLARIS ROBOTICS PTE. LTD.
